message:
fix: polecat nuke, shell-alias cwd, dolt PID staleness (#1408)

Apply changes from PR #1408 (fix-merge with attribution):
- Kill tmux session unconditionally during polecat nuke (not just on force)
- Detect shell-alias cwd in gt done and gt mq submit (GT_POLECAT/GT_CREW fallback)
- Add GT_RIG env var fallback in findCurrentRig for mq commands
- Add inter-spawn delay in batch sling to prevent Dolt lock contention
- Repair stale PID file when Dolt server detected on port but PID mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Nic Wanavit <thanakijwanavit@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
